articles.description: In the current bull market frenzy focusing on Bitcoin and Ethereum, a quieter yet significant surge is happening with SOL, the primary token of the Solana blockchain. articles.description: Tether, the company responsible for the largest stablecoin in the cryptocurrency market, has taken a proactive step in its security measures by announcing a new wallet-freezing policy today.
